title: ilysanthes refracta var. saxicola
intro: Ilysanthes refracta var. saxicola is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is also known as the rock ilysanthes or rock ilysanthe, a plant commonly found in Australia. The plant is said to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which are believed to be due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is used to prepare infusions and tinctures to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
